elements.name: Logout from Trumore App if user is already logged in before starting a new test scenario

steps.name: User is on Main Page
User clicks profile app bar icon on the Main Page
User is on Profile Page
User clicks logout button
User is on Logout Confirmation Pop up
User clicks logout button on the Logout Confirmation Pop up

elements.name: Verify that user raises a vehicle ownership request by sending all documents as documents uploaded from file explorer

steps.name: User is on Welcome Page
User clicks create account button on the Welcome Page
User is on Create Account Page
User enters first name as "Vehicle Ownership"
User enters last name as "Request"
User enters random new e-mail
User enters new password as "Togg1234."
User enters confirm password as "Togg1234."
User clicks Create Account button on the Create Account Page
User is on Verify Account Page
User enters verification code
User clicks send button on the Verify Account Page
User is on Main Page
User clicks My Smart Device Navigation Bar Button on the Main Page
User is on My Smart Device Page
User clicks Add Smart Device Button on My Smart Device Page
User is on Add Smart Device Page
User clicks Upload Document Button
User is on Upload File popup
User clicks Upload from files button
User selects first document on the recents list
User selects second document on the recents list
User approves document selections
User is on Add Smart Device Page
User checks uploaded documents
User clicks Send Documents Button
User is on Documents Sent Page
